untranslatable_reason: The core signal requires detection of 'climax day' (new extreme) and precise retracement measurement to 38.2% Fibonacci level. While Donchian channels can approximate new extremes, they cannot reliably identify climax conditions or measure exact Fibonacci retracement percentages without additional custom logic. The signal's emphasis on 'no predictive filters' and 'objective market conditions' requires pattern recognition beyond standard indicator comparisons. Retracement threshold calculation (38.2% of climax move) requires historical price range analysis not available in allowed indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation: Used dc_upper to detect new highs and dc_lower/dc_upper relationship to suggest retracement context. However, this misses the essential Fibonacci retracement measurement and climax day identification that are core to the signal. The 38.2% retracement threshold and ATR-based exit (breakeven + 1 ATR within 5 bars) require custom calculations outside standard indicators.
